page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with 1 thread per core, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6149 processor running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network volumes. It also lacks integrated GPU hardware accelerators, making it unsuitable for graphics-intensive or hardware-accelerated machine learning workloads. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.hfg5.xlarge offers dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading, ensuring predictable compute performance for workloads sensitive to resource sharing. The balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it appropriate for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application servers, medium-traffic databases, and lightweight containerized deployments that require consistent CPU performance without the overhead of shared-core architectures.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is configured with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon 6149 vCPUs operating at 3.1 GHz, featuring a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio for predictable compute performance. The instance provides 16.0 GB of system memory, translating to 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring external network storage for data persistence. Network performance is defined by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps, and no complimentary public IPv4 addresses are provided. This resource profile is suitable for general-purpose applications, web servers, and application hosting where dedicated CPU execution is required without hyperthreading interference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg5.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon 6149 vCPUs at 3.1 GHz, 16.0 GB of RAM, 2 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage.

tagline: A dedicated four-core virtual machine featuring a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and predictable compute performance for general-purpose workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
No local storage or integrated GPU accelerators included
Well-suited for web serving, application hosting, and general-purpose workloads
